ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_postal" TEXT /* Postal abbreviation for the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (people per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the given date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the given date */,
  "as_of" TEXT /* Datetime of the data record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  "updated_time" TEXT /* Time of last update */,
  "national_total" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases nationally */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case data (e.g., health department, hospital, etc.) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of data quality (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "population_2010" INTEGER /* Population count according to the 2010 census */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population count according to the 2020 census */,
  "population_2021" INTEGER /* Population count according to the 2021 census */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million people */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females in the state population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_logs" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update log */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the case data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., add, delete, modify) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_data ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_totals" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the total record */,
  "national_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases nationally */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported nationally on the given date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases nationally on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases nationally on the given date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths nationally on the given date */,
  "total_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of last update for national totals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Datetime of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region within the state */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in this region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million people in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distributions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who have received the first dose */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who have received the second dose */,
  "booster_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who have received a booster dose */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate per hundred people */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is fully vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "daily_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the given date */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests on the given date */,
  "negative_tests" INTEGER /* Number of negative tests on the given date */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive tests as a percentage */,
  "testing_centers" INTEGER /* Number of testing centers in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_advisories" (
  "advisory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health advisory */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "advisory_text" TEXT /* Text of the health advisory */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisory was issued */,
  "advisory_type" TEXT /* Type of health advisory (e.g., public, internal) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisory expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the advisory (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_advisories_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
